fail_closed_readiness_invariant.statement: Until all blocking mechanism and scenario corrections have passed the declared specialist reviews and corrected evidence has been re-executed, aggregation must remain fail-closed: mechanism_comparison_readiness = not_ready, mechanism_selection_readiness = not_ready, selection_status = none

revised_classification.host_catalog_pass_interpretation: Thirteen scenarios recorded Passed on macOS at commit 6460148; several passes are tautological or logical-only and do not support comparison or selection claims

material_distinctness.precise_conclusion: The originally declared authority-model distinction — relational canonical entity authority versus append-authoritative replay — is not demonstrated by the current implementations. Both implementations currently persist full normalized-state JSON snapshots as their effective canonical representation. They still differ in physical container, transaction engine, journaling, and file-operation behavior; this review does not conclude that they are identical in every mechanism-level property.

transaction_behavior.declared_original_claim: Authoritative command returns Ok only after SQLite transaction COMMIT succeeds (candidate-classes.json durable_acknowledgement_boundary)
transaction_behavior.note: COMMIT boundary exists; proves in-process transaction completion not filesystem durability

duplication.declared_original_claim: New session directory and database copied under new session identity with duplicated_from lineage metadata (candidate-classes.json duplication_behavior)
duplication.declared_assumption_or_dependency: Filesystem copy of session.db tested only as spike control; not a product backup feature (backup_boundary)
duplication.reviewer_finding: The implemented session.db-only copy is not WAL-safe under enabled journal_mode=WAL
duplication.note: WAL enabled; copy omits -wal/-shm; duplicate content salvaged via in-memory rewrite

writer_crash_recovery.declared_original_claim: Dedicated writer_lock table row plus open writable handle enforcement (candidate-classes.json single_writer_strategy)
writer_crash_recovery.note: Token survives crash indefinitely; no takeover path

relational_model_conformance.note: Authority is single state_json blob; reclassify as SQLite-hosted JSON snapshot

durability_claim_strength.declared_original_claim: Authoritative command returns Ok only after SQLite transaction COMMIT succeeds

append_authority.declared_original_claim: Append-only JSONL canonical log plus generation manifest and optional checkpoint snapshots (candidate-classes.json authoritative_state_model)
append_authority.note: Checkpoint is authority; log records lack command payload

replay_behavior.declared_original_claim: Log replay validates record chain; truncated or invalid canonical records fail closed (candidate-classes.json corruption_behavior)
replay_behavior.note: replay_log validates seq only; returns checkpoint unchanged

durable_acknowledgement.declared_ack_boundary: Authoritative command returns Ok only after append record fsync and manifest generation bump via atomic rename (candidate-classes.json durable_acknowledgement_boundary)
durable_acknowledgement.observed_implementation: Append log path calls sync_all; checkpoint and manifest use temp write + rename without file or directory fsync
durable_acknowledgement.note: Directory fsync is a declared dependency, not demonstrated implementation

writer_crash_recovery.declared_original_claim: writer.lock token file with epoch counter; stale ownership requires explicit takeover with integrity reload (candidate-classes.json single_writer_strategy)
writer_crash_recovery.note: Token in manifest.json; takeover declared but not implemented

compaction_recovery.declared_original_claim: Optional generation rewrite compacts log into new checkpoint generation with atomic directory swap (candidate-classes.json compaction_gc_behavior)
compaction_recovery.note: Post-compaction seq/log inconsistency can break recovery; interrupted-compaction fault is pre-mutation only

mechanism_class_conformance.declared_original_claim: Append-oriented event/log storage with versioned bundle directory (candidate-classes.json mechanism_class)
mechanism_class_conformance.note: Effective canonical representation is checkpoint JSON snapshot; append log is metadata stub

supersedes_claims: Declared authority-model distinctness as demonstrated merely because two candidates exist
Append-oriented authoritative log recovery for append-bundle candidate
Relational entity authority for embedded-relational candidate
ProcessInterruption and ProcessCrashRecovery classification for current interrupted-* handlers
Derived corruption rebuild claim for derived-state-corruption scenario as recorded
Duplication independence claim for semantic-duplication scenario as recorded
Interrupted-compaction recovery claim for current pre-mutation fault handler
FilesystemDurability and HardwarePowerLoss for spike-v1 macOS run
Cross-platform eligibility beyond macOS host execution
Directory fsync as implemented append-bundle behavior

preserved_original_evidence.policy: Original spike-v1-macos-6460148 artifacts retained unchanged; this reclassification adds explicit downgrade without deletion
